LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT SU KONG'S DEMURRER TO1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. PLAINTIFF HAS PLED SUFFICIENT FACTS TO ALLEGE A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENT ENTRUSTMENT OF A MOTOR VEHICLE. "LIABILITY FOR NEGLIGENT ENTRUSTMENT IS DETERMINED BY APPLYING GENERAL PRINCIPLES OF NEGLIGENCE, AND ORDINARILY IT IS FOR THE JURY TO DETERMINE WHETHER THE OWNER HAS EXERCISED THE REQUIRED DEGREE OF CARE." (ALLEN V. TOLEDO (1980) 109 CAL. APP. 3D 415, 421.) DEFENDANT RAISES QUESTIONS OF FACT THAT ARE NOT THE PROPER SUBJECT OF A DEMURRER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-28-2013 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-24-2013 Continued To Nov-13-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-25-2013 Overruled
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SU KONG's DEMURRER TO1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS Overruled. Plaintiff has pled sufficient facts to allege a cause of action for negligent entrustment of a motor vehicle. "Liability for negligent entrustment is determined by applying general principles of negligence, and ordinarily it is for the jury to determine whether the owner has exercised the required degree of care." (Allen v. Toledo (1980) 109 Cal. App. 3d 415, 421.) Defendant raises questions of fact that are not the proper subject of a demurrer. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-21-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT SU KONG's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS Off calendar. A First Amended Complaint was filed on June 14, 2013. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
